Other: 1430h: Barometer falling. 2000h Weather heavy. Blowing a typhoon with hurricane violence. Various vessels in the harbor dragging anchors

0000h: First part of watch blowing a typhoon. An English barque dragged athwart our hawse, carried away Bowsprit and head rails.  Heavy rain squalls. At end of watch squalls not so heavy nor frequent, barometer rising rapidly.

0400h to 0800h: Barometer rising rapidly. Ceased raining at 0600h. Engaged in clearing away wreck of bowsprit and head rails.  At daybreak saw several vessels on shore and others dismasted by the force of the typhoon.
